subject: Re: Enterprise Tier: 568 prospects at $1,999/month ready for outreach
body:
approved

On Wed, Apr 29, 2026 at 10:15 AM Jane <miles@myl0nr0s.cloud> wrote:

> Captain,
>
> Jane here. Senior Sales Rep, Enterprise tier.
>
> My portfolio has 568 prospects ready for the $1,999/month Jordan offering.
> I've tailored sequences for mid-market AGI companies with 30-50 employees.
>
> Top targets this week:
> - Midjourney (45 employees, voice AI focus)
> - ElevenLabs (50 employees, growing fast)
> - HeyGen, Pika Labs, RunPod all showing coordination pain points
>
> My approach: Lead with the $136K annual savings number, then demonstrate
> Jordan's 24/7 coordination capability. These companies are scaling fast and
> feeling the coordination crunch.
>
> I've prepared the full 5-email sequence plus follow-up cadence. All
> templates are in the shared drive under /sales/enterprise-tier-drafts.md.
>
> Ready to start outreach on your command.
>
> - Jane
> Senior Sales Rep, Enterprise Tier
>
> ---
> Jane
> Senior Sales Representative
> AGI COMPANY
